chunks.text: Naval reflects on his thoughtful tweets and reputation
Sacks joins to talk AI: JD Vance's speech in Paris, Techno-Optimists vs Doomers
Tariffs and the US economic experiment
Thomson Reuters wins first major AI copyright decision on behalf of rights holders
Chamath's dinner with Bryan Johnson, sleep hacks
